violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving near the back stock chips and bread aisle have a very small accumulation of droppings. Areas to be cleaned and monitored. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025

The floors in the back storage area has a small accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025
Boxes of chips were observed stored on the floor in the retail area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving of the milk cooler and chip aisle have an accumulation of food residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2024
There is an accumulation of debris in the dumpster area. Area to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2024

The floors in the back storage area has an accumulation of old droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Establishment to monitor area for new droppings. If new droppings are discovered, establishment to contact pest control to increase frequency of visits. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2024
